basic_details.job_title: CMD Project Monitoring Executive Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Centre for Management Development (CMD) has released the official Project Monitoring Executive Notification 2026 at the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the CMD Project Monitoring Executive Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates up to 40 years of age with a Bachelor's or Master's degree in Engineering or a related field, proficiency in SQL and dashboarding tools (Power BI/ Tableau), and strong report writing and documentation skills can apply online on or before 24 July 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's/ Master's in Engineering or related field, Proficiency in SQL and dash Boarding tools (Power BI/ Tableau), Strong report writing and Documentation skills, Familiarity with central scheme reporting formats/ portals is a plus
qualification.details: Bachelor's/Master's in Engineering or related field. Proficiency in SQL and dash Boarding tools (Power BI/ Tableau). Strong report writing and Documentation skills. Familiarity with central scheme reporting formats/ portals is a plus.

selection_process: Application Screening Criteria-based Screening Written Test Group Discussion Skill Test/Proficiency Test Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CMD Project Monitoring Executive Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CMD to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CMD Project Monitoring Executive Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CMD to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CMD Project Monitoring Executive Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CMD Project Monitoring Executive recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Project Monitoring Executive post is 24th July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Project Monitoring Executive position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Monitoring Executive role will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 46,230 per month.

faq.question: Q3. What are the essential qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Bachelor's or Master's degree in Engineering or a related field, along with proficiency in SQL and dashboarding tools like Power BI or Tableau.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any age limit for the Project Monitoring Executive role?
faq.answer: Yes, the maximum age limit for applying to the Project Monitoring Executive position is 40 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for the CMD recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Project Monitoring Executive post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the Project Monitoring Executive position in the Centre for Management Development.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the CMD Project Monitoring Executive recruitment is entirely online. Candidates must apply through the official website.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Project Monitoring Executive role?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Application Screening, Criteria-based Screening, Written Test, Group Discussion, Skill Test/Proficiency Test, and Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It contains all the detailed information.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Project Monitoring Executive position is a contractual role offered by the Centre for Management Development.
